name: Four-Chamber Heart (Mechanical)
institution: Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Institute of Biomedical Engineering (KIT IBT)
Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Institute of Applied and Numerical Mathematics (KIT IANM)
description: Mechanical mesh of the four-chamber human heart segmented from MRI of a healthy volunteer. Coarse tetrahedral mesh with 12 material regions. Used for fully coupled multi-physics simulation: electrophysiology, mechanics, and closed-loop circulation.
spp_project: Efficient and robust coupling methods for electro-mechanic models of the human heart
